generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values community safety, I've noticed how overblown civil defense spending can actually weaken our national security. By diverting funds to preparedness programs that focus on hypothetical scenarios, we're neglecting real threats. Our allies are reducing their civil defense budgets - shouldn't we be more strategic too? #NationalSecurityFirst #SmartSpending
